Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Yamagishi-san, are you in there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I think we should start heading to the command room, and— Huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You already finished unpacking? I was planning on helping you out later, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Well, I didn't have too much with me, so I finished a lot sooner than I expected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh, are you good with computers, by any chance?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You think you could teach me? I'm really not good with stuff like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Are you looking into something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yes, I figured I should know everyone's defining characteristics and whatnot, to prepare for battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I can't do any actual fighting, so I need to make myself useful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You're a really hard worker, Yamagishi-san. And you've got an amazing ability too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Now that I think about it, everyone in this dorm is pretty amazing, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Sanada-senpai is hands down one of the strongest, and {f 4 1}-kun has a power unlike anyone else's.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I bet Kirijo-senpai's strong, too. And Junpei... Well, he's whatever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But what do I have? I'm only half the person everyone else here is. I couldn't even do anything the last full moon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Maybe I don't need to be here after all, haha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I was told that a Persona is the power of the soul, also known as your other self.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That's why I think a person's personality and feelings are reflected in their Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}For example, Takeba-san, your Persona has healing powers, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That's because there's a kindness in you that no one else has.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I just don't want to see anyone go down or get hurt, that's all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}C'mon. I think Ikutsuki-san's gonna be here soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Oh, and you can just call me Yukari. I hope you like it here, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
